channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish on street. Has been here for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Saint Paul's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park bench is broken, 23rd March
item.description:
Park bench has 2 front wooden slats missing and could injure someone using it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowthorpe Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Treelands Close, Leckhampton, Cheltenham

item.description:
Junction of back lane and Malthouse Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Back Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe

item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Bit missing off the traffic light, 23rd March
item.description:
Opposite the brewery quarter, Henrietta st and dunalley at

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Henrietta Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

item.category: The traffic light has been vandalised

item.description:

item.title: Dirty, rubbish strewn street, particularly the eastern footpath, 23rd March
item.description:
The entire length of 5 Gloucester Place, particularly the eastern footpath, is filthy with litter, dog faeces, and general grime. I have seen several rats along this pavement, which highlights the degraded state of the road. The road requires an urgent clean/resurface

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Gloucester Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged and unused metal signpost obstructing the pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
The damaged signpost is outside number 4 Gloucester Place. This has been in this degraded state for years, and obstructs prams and wheelchairs. There are sharp edges of the metal, which could be dangerous to pedestrians. This contributes to the abysmal condition of the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Gloucester Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: 2 years ago I contacted highways about a dead tree - they reported back that it would be removed - it’s still there!!, 23rd March
item.description:
Side of 59 Kempton Grove - dead tree - been dead/dying for several years!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Kempton Grove, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
